title: coleus articulatus
intro: Coleus articulatus, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus scutellarioides, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family and is known for its fragrant leaves and flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus articulatus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. Coleus articulatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, to promote overall well-being.
